# Foyer

> Foyer is a voice sales agent for websites. It answers visitor questions using on-site content, navigates the page in real time, captures leads, and is installed with a single embed snippet.

## Primary URLs
- Homepage: https://tryfoyer.ai/
- App: https://app.tryfoyer.ai/
- Sign up: https://app.tryfoyer.ai/dashboard/signup
- Sign in: https://app.tryfoyer.ai/dashboard/signin

## Product Summary
- Voice sales agent for websites
- Real-time page navigation during conversations
- Lead capture and transcript logging
- Proactive greeting on by default: a few seconds after page load, a "tap to talk" bubble appears and the browser asks for microphone access; if the visitor allows, the conversation opens automatically. Returning visitors who already granted access skip straight into a conversation. Owners can turn the proactive greeting off from the dashboard so the floating button only opens on tap.
- Custom context from the dashboard: extra instructions or information not on the website (internal policies, product nuance, response guidance) can be added per agent and edited any time, used alongside the crawled site content.
- Returning visitor memory: when a visitor comes back, the agent recognizes them and brings past conversations and details into the new one across browser sessions
- Multilingual conversations across 30 languages with automatic switching when a visitor speaks a different language (Starter+ plans)
- 60+ curated voices with male/female/multi-accent/multi-age options
- Instant email notifications on every captured lead
- Visitor analytics dashboard: country, device, browser, OS, unique vs returning vs engaged visitor counts, time on site vs time in conversation, click and keypress activity, 30-day daily breakdown (Starter+ plans)

## Pricing Summary
- Free: $0, 100 minute lifetime trial (no monthly reset), 1 agent, up to 50 indexed pages, single language, conversations + leads visible (no analytics dashboard)
- Starter: $79/month, 800 minutes per month, 1 agent for 1 business, up to 500 indexed pages, multilingual auto-switching, custom branding, full visitor analytics, instant lead email notifications
- Growth: $299/month, 5,000 minutes per month, up to 3 agents for sister companies or sub-brands, up to 2,000 indexed pages, everything in Starter, branded widget designs, priority support

## Supported Languages
- English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Dutch, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Hungarian, Romanian, Bulgarian, Croatian, Greek, Swedish, Danish, Russian, Ukrainian, Turkish, Arabic, Hindi, Tamil, Mandarin Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Vietnamese, Indonesian, Malay, Filipino

## Installation
- Add the widget script from the app after creating an agent
- Supported on Webflow, WordPress, Shopify, Framer, React, and plain HTML

## Contact
- Email: hello@tryfoyer.ai
